---
title: "Navigating the Job Market"
subtitle: "A data-driven analysis of hiring trends, skill demand, and career outlooks from the Lightcast job postings dataset."
title-block-banner: "#1a2b4a"
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

::: {.hero-intro}

## About this project

We are **Team 1 of AD688 (Spring 2026)** five analysts exploring how the U.S. job market is evolving in the age of AI, remote work, and shifting industry demand. Drawing on **millions of job postings** from the Lightcast dataset, we investigate where the opportunities are, which skills matter most, and how geography and industry shape career outcomes today.

Each team member owns a research question below. Click any card to dive into the full analysis.

:::

## At a glance {.unnumbered}

::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.stat-card}
**1.2M+**
<br><span class="stat-label">Job postings analyzed</span>
:::

::: {.stat-card}
**5**
<br><span class="stat-label">Research questions</span>
:::

::: {.stat-card}
**15+**
<br><span class="stat-label">Industries covered</span>
:::

::: {.stat-card}
**50**
<br><span class="stat-label">U.S. states surveyed</span>
:::

:::

## Research questions {.unnumbered}

::: {.grid .research-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.research-card}
### AI & ML Evolution
How have job descriptions evolved to require AI and machine learning expertise?

[Read analysis →](omar.html){.card-link}

<span class="author">Omar</span>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.research-card}
### Data Science Demand
Which industries are hiring the most data scientists, and what does the growth look like?

[Read analysis →](ricardo.html){.card-link}

<span class="author">Ricardo</span>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.research-card}
### Business Analytics Outlook
What is the career outlook for business analytics professionals in 2024 and beyond?

[Read analysis →](tianyi.html){.card-link}

<span class="author">Tianyi</span>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.research-card}
### Geographic Trends
Where are the hottest regional job markets, and how does location shape opportunity?

[Read analysis →](yingyi.html){.card-link}

<span class="author">Yingyi</span>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.research-card}
### Remote Work Landscape
How has remote and hybrid work reshaped hiring across industries?

[Read analysis →](zichen.html){.card-link}

<span class="author">Zichen</span>
:::
:::

:::

## Explore by topic {.unnumbered}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.topic-card}
#### 🌍 Geographic & Remote Work
Regional hiring patterns, state-level comparisons, and the rise of remote-friendly employers.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.topic-card}
#### 📊 DS, BA & ML Trends
Skill demand curves, industry adoption, and career outlooks for data and analytics roles.
:::
:::

:::

::: {.footer-note}
Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) · Data from [Lightcast](https://lightcast.io) · AD688 Team 1, Spring 2026
:::
